$comment: NounAuthor Phase-3 misconception proposals. The 9 plural-spelling misses are ALREADY TAGGED inline in grammar_questions_noun.json (cg_plural_stress_misapplied x6, cia_gia_plural_i x3) using confirmed registry ids. This file (a) records that provenance for MisconceptionAnalyst's tag-list build, since 'noun' is not yet a topic in misconception_tag_lists.json, and (b) proposes ids for the classes with NO confirmed registry home. Registry is architecture-owned; nothing here is invented into it.

gaps_needing_a_registry_id.why_no_existing_tag: orthography.double_i_retained is defined for -ciare/-giare VERBS and orthography.i_retention_error for -iare VERBS; neither covers the noun -io plural (figlio->figli vs zio->zii). This is the noun analogue, same shape as the cia_gia_plural_i gap I flagged last pass which Architecture then created.
gaps_needing_a_registry_id.proposed_label: Noun -io plural: wrong i-count by stress (figlii / zi)

proposals_for_other_leaves_not_in_the_co.class: English -s plural transferred onto Italian nouns
misses: and the -os variants across the spelling leaf
proposals_for_other_leaves_not_in_the_co.note: regular + invariable + several spelling items carry an anglicised -s guard. No 'anglicisation' orthography id exists in the registry. Proposing transfer.english_s_plural (or an orthography sibling) for MisconceptionAnalyst to rule; NOT tagged inline since unconfirmed.

proposals_for_other_leaves_not_in_the_co.class: Wrong lexical gender on a noun (article/agreement follows)
misses: la problema, la programma, la tema (masc -ma read as fem)
il mano, il foto, il radio (fem -o read as masc)
la poeta (masc -a person read as fem)
proposals_for_other_leaves_not_in_the_co.note: the gender-leaf must_not entries (wrong article la/il, una/un). agreement.adjective_noun and agreement.clitic_gender_number exist but neither fits a NOUN's own lexical gender being misremembered. Proposing agreement.noun_lexical_gender for a ruling; NOT tagged inline.
